collectiondata.overview:
Unlock the World – Under 1,50,000 with Travelxploria
Luxury, Culture, and Timeless Escapes – All Within Reach

The dream of exploring the world doesn't belong to the wealthy alone—it belongs to the dreamers, the explorers, the lovers of sunsets in strange cities, of breakfast on the beach, of quiet mountain paths and music-filled squares. And now, with Travelxploria’s premium collection of journeys under 1,50,000, the world isn’t just within reach—it’s ready to embrace you.

Imagine drifting in a pool that melts into the Indian Ocean, as soft breezes carry the scent of salt and sun-kissed flowers. Picture yourself wandering through narrow cobbled streets where centuries echo in every footstep, or floating past misty Alpine peaks with nothing but silence and sky. Whether it’s a candlelit dinner on a tropical island, a gondola ride beneath starlit bridges, or watching the pyramids glow at dusk—you don’t have to imagine it anymore. You just have to pack.

With Travelxploria, your Best Travel Agency and award-winning Best International Tour Operator, every journey is an artfully curated symphony of comfort, wonder, and unforgettable memories. Our Best Tour Operator services ensure that even the grandest destinations are accessible—with no compromise on experience. This is travel that doesn’t cut corners—it opens doors.

Our under 1,50,000 experiences are crafted for the curious heart and the discerning traveler. Sail through Europe’s timeless rivers, where fairy-tale towns and grand capitals greet you in a single voyage. Lose yourself in the serene opulence of overwater villas in the Maldives or the postcard-perfect charm of Mauritius’s turquoise lagoons and volcanic landscapes. Let the ancient mysteries of Egypt and Jordan unfold before your eyes—from mighty pyramids to rose-red cities carved into cliffs—each moment steeped in story.

And then, there are the unexpected joys: lantern festivals in Southeast Asia that light up your soul, desert safaris across golden dunes where silence tells its own tale, or mountaintop cable rides offering views you’ll remember long after the pictures fade. Every destination you’ve longed for, every emotion you hoped to feel—now lies within a smart, thoughtfully budgeted experience.

For honeymooners, Travelxploria—your Best Honeymoon Planner—creates dreamy escapes that blend privacy, romance, and soul-stirring landscapes. Toast to new beginnings by the beach, beneath the stars, or within a heritage city lit with evening charm. And for families, our handpicked Best Family Package options bring together child-friendly fun and grown-up indulgence—cultural walks, guided excursions, relaxing resorts, and lots of moments that become cherished memories.

What makes our under 1,50,000 journeys truly special is how much they include. From carefully selected accommodations and curated local experiences to seamless airport transfers and professional guides, we take care of every detail, so you only focus on being present. Whether you’re a first-time traveler or a seasoned globe-trotter, we tailor your trip with precision, passion, and personality.

Our travelers don't just collect passport stamps—they collect stories. A smile shared with a shopkeeper in a hidden village. A photograph taken at the edge of the world. A local dish that surprises you with its warmth. These are the things you remember—not how much you paid, but how deeply you felt.

At Travelxploria, we believe value doesn’t mean compromise—it means confidence. Confidence that your journey is worth every rupee. Confidence that you’re travelling with the Best Travel Agency, backed by the expertise of the Best Tour Operator and the insight of a true Best International Tour Operator.

So go ahead. Let your heart choose the destination—be it island, city, mountain, or desert. We’ll make sure it fits not just your bucket list, but your budget too.

Uncover the extraordinary. Live the luxury. Travel the world—under 1,50,000—with Travelxploria.

packages.package_name: Atlantic Morocco
packages.overview:
• ​​Arrival in Tangier, transfer to hotel, dinner included, free evening with guide contact later.
  • Morning free in Tangier, visit coastal Asilah with lunch, then travel to Rabat for dinner and overnight.
  • Tour Rabat’s historic sites, brief Casablanca city tour including Hassan II Mosque, visit El Jadida’s Portuguese citadel, end day in Safi with dinner.
  • Morning tour of Safi’s ceramics and fortress, free time for lunch and stroll in Essaouira’s UNESCO Medina, stop at Taghazout, then dinner in Agadir.
  • Free morning in Agadir to enjoy beaches or shopping before trip conclusion and travel advice for onward transfers.​

We’ll begin the day with some free time in Tangier during the morning, allowing you to explore or relax at your own pace. Later, we’ll travel south to Asilah, a beautiful walled city perched on the Atlantic coast. Once a notorious pirate stronghold, Asilah now enchants visitors with its stunning seaside views and charming streets. You’ll have the chance to enjoy lunch here, with your guide providing the exact timing. At 4:30 p.m., we’ll depart Asilah and continue our journey along the motorway to Rabat, Morocco’s diplomatic capital, known for its distinctive charm. Dinner and accommodation will be waiting upon arrival at 7:30 p.m.

At 8:00 a.m., we begin a city tour of Rabat, the beautiful capital of Morocco. Highlights include the impressive Oudaia fortress, the Hassan Tower and the mausoleum of King Mohamed V, the Andalusian walls, the Royal Palace’s outer enclosure, and the modern embassy district. After the tour, you’ll have free time. At noon, we depart Rabat and arrive in Casablanca by 1:15 p.m. for a brief city tour, including an external visit to the magnificent Hassan II Mosque, followed by lunch at the Corniche boulevard. At 2:30 p.m., we travel south along the Atlantic to El Jadida, where we explore the Portuguese-built Mazagan citadel and its historic streets, including the old cistern (subject to reopening). At 6 p.m., we leave for Safi, arriving by 8 p.m. for dinner.

At 8:30 a.m., we begin our guided morning tour of Safi, famous for its vibrant ceramics. We’ll visit the Castle of the Sea with its impressive fortress walls, explore the charming Medina, and stop at the Hill of the Potters, filled with artisan shops. By 10:00 a.m., we depart for Essaouira, known as the Blue Pearl of the Atlantic. This historic city features a UNESCO-listed walled Medina and stunning beaches. You’ll have free time to enjoy lunch and wander its scenic streets. At 3:00 p.m., we continue along the Atlantic coast, stopping briefly at Taghazout, a quaint fishing and surf town. By 7:30 p.m., we arrive in Agadir for dinner.

packages.package_name: London Paris Fusion History Meets Romance
packages.overview:
• Land in the romantic capital of France and settle into your hotel.

  • Explore Parisian landmarks with an Eiffel Tower visit and a scenic Seine River cruise.

  • Spend a magical day at Disneyland Paris.

  • Travel to London and enjoy your first taste of British charm.

  • Discover London’s highlights and ride the iconic London Eye.

  • Enjoy the scenic beauty and academic prestige on a full-day guided tour.

  • Explore royal history, ancient wonders, and Roman heritage.

  • Experience lifelike celebrity encounters at the famous wax museum.

  • Say goodbye to London and depart with wonderful memories.

Discover the magic of Paris with Travelxploria, your ultimate travel companion for an unforgettable city tour! Our expert Travelxploria guide will lead you through the heart of the City of Lights, ensuring a seamless and enriching experience. Wander through the elegant streets of Palais Royal, soak in the romance of the Pont des Arts, and admire the timeless beauty of Notre-Dame Cathedral. Stroll through the charming Tuileries Garden, witness the grandeur of Place de la Concorde, and take in the luxury of Champs-Élysées and the Arc de Triomphe. With perfect photo stops at the Eiffel Tower, Grand Palais, and Les Invalides, Travelxploria’s exceptional on-ground support guarantees an effortless and immersive Parisian adventure.

Sail into the romantic heart of Paris with Travelxploria on a luxurious Seine River Dinner Cruise! Glide past the city's most iconic landmarks, from the glittering Eiffel Tower to the majestic Notre-Dame Cathedral and the timeless Louvre Museum, all beautifully illuminated against the night sky. Indulge in a gourmet multi-course meal, expertly crafted with the finest French flavors, paired with exquisite wine. As soft melodies fill the air, soak in the enchanting Parisian ambiance, making this experience perfect for romance, celebrations, or simply a night of elegance. With Travelxploria’s impeccable service, let us turn your evening into a truly unforgettable journey on the Seine.

Enjoy a seamless and stress-free visit to the iconic Eiffel Tower with Travelxploria! Skip the long lines with priority access to the 2nd floor, where you’ll be greeted with breathtaking panoramic views of Paris’ stunning skyline. Marvel at the Seine River, Arc de Triomphe, and Notre-Dame from above, capturing unforgettable moments. Whether you visit during the day for a clear cityscape or at night to witness the tower’s dazzling lights, this experience is a must for every traveler. With Travelxploria’s expert guidance and seamless service, get ready for an unparalleled Parisian adventure.

After breakfast, check out from your hotel and head to Gare du Nord station to board the Eurostar train to London. packages.package_name: London Paris Highlights From Big Ben to Eiffel Tower
packages.overview:
• Touch down in London and settle into the lively British capital.

  • Discover London’s landmarks with a city tour, cruise, and panoramic London Eye ride.

  • Dive into the magical world at Warner Bros. Harry Potter Studios.

  • Enjoy London at your own pace with optional activities or shopping.

  • Travel to Paris by train and visit the iconic Eiffel Tower.

  • Explore Parisian landmarks and enjoy a scenic cruise on the Seine.

  • Take a guided tour of the opulent Palace of Versailles.

  • Admire world-famous masterpieces at the Louvre Museum.

  • Depart from Paris with wonderful memories of your European getaway.

packages.overview:
• Arrive in Amsterdam and settle into the vibrant Dutch capital.

  • Explore Amsterdam’s highlights with a guided city and scenic canal tour.

  • Enjoy a traditional Dutch countryside day trip.

  • Travel to Frankfurt and unwind in the city.

  • Discover Frankfurt’s blend of modern architecture and historic charm.

  • Journey to Munich, the heart of Bavaria.

  • Visit two fairytale castles nestled in the Bavarian Alps.

  • Explore medieval Rothenburg and the unique Ries crater region.

  • Depart from Munich with unforgettable memories of your European adventure.

Embark on a captivating day trip from Munich to Rothenburg ob der Tauber and the Nördlinger Ries. Begin with a scenic drive to Rothenburg, a beautifully preserved medieval town known for its half-timbered houses, cobblestone streets, and charming old-world atmosphere. Stroll through the historic town center, visit the medieval walls, and explore unique shops and cafes. Continue to the fascinating Nördlinger Ries, a vast crater formed by a meteorite impact 15 million years ago. Discover the quaint town of Nördlingen, built within the crater, and learn about its unique geological history. This day offers a perfect blend of culture and nature.

packages.overview:
• Sleek and spacious accommodations make Sun Siyam Iru Veli the ultimate tropical retreat. With front row lagoon views and a freshwater pool for every five star suite, all you have to do is check in, chill out and let our neighbouring dolphins provide your entertainment as they swim past each day.
  • From the moment you arrive, shoes are left at the door, so forget dress codes and come as you are. Here we live the barefoot idyll, so sit back and sink your toes into the softest white sand – it doesn’t get better than this.
  • Priding ourselves on innovation, our main restaurant has a daily-changing menu to mix up seasonal flavours, and we serve plenty of the ocean’s bounty with the best seafood you’ll ever taste. You can even watch exotic fish pass under the glass floor below as you sink into a relaxing massage. It’s time to discover the true meaning of rest and rejuvenation here on our sapphire waters.

packages.package_name: Atmosphere Kanifushi Maldives
packages.overview:
• Some places are best experienced; where your eyes chase the endless expanse of the ocean while the soft sand caresses your feet and the crisp air fills your lungs with life. Where time moves lazily as sunshine sparkles on the turquoise waters and swaying palm trees serenade your senses. Welcome to such a slice of tropical luxury, nestled in the stunning yet sparsely populated Lhaviyani Atoll. A short seaplane ride from Male International Airport, our all-inclusive resort in the Maldives features luxurious villas amidst lush vegetation and the alluring Indian Ocean. The interiors feature contemporary Maldivian accents, overlooking crystal-clear waters underneath which a magical world of coral reefs awaits exploration. This is a tropical experience that is as unique as it is luxurious and one that will make you come back in a heartbeat.
  • Much like the diversity of our palm-fringed island, our dining experiences are teeming with unique culinary choices. From homely Sri Lankan cuisine to tantalising global flavours, from contemporary vegetarian delights to authentic Japanese teppanyaki, our chefs are delighted to plate for every discerning palate. We’re here to serve gastronomical experiences that make your heart full and appetite satiated but leave your taste buds longing for more.

packages.package_name: Discover the hidden Treasure of Egypt
packages.overview:
1. Egypt: A mesmerizing blend of ancient wonders, vast deserts, and the timeless beauty of the Nile.

  2. Cairo: Explore the Pyramids of Giza, Sphinx, Egyptian Museum, and the bustling Khan El Khalili Bazaar. Immerse yourself in the rich history and vibrant culture of Egypt’s capital.

  3. White Desert: Witness the surreal landscapes of chalk-white rock formations and golden dunes. Enjoy desert safaris, camping, and stargazing in this unique natural wonder.

  4. Dakhla Oasis: A hidden gem in Egypt’s Western Desert, known for lush palm groves, ancient mud-brick villages, and rejuvenating hot springs.

  5. Nile Cruise: Sail through history on a luxury cruise between Luxor and Aswan, visiting temples like Karnak, Edfu, and Philae while enjoying breathtaking river views.

to the Pyramids, Sphinx, and the Egyptian Museum","day_summary":"

After breakfast at the hotel, a representative of Travelxploria will pick you up and transfer you in an air-conditioned vehicle, accompanied by an English-speaking Egyptologist, to the iconic Giza Necropolis. Explore the renowned Giza Pyramid Complex, including the Great Pyramid of Giza, the Pyramid of Khafre, and the Pyramid of Menkaure, along with their associated structures and the legendary Great Sphinx. Discover the rich history of the site, dating back to the Fourth Dynasty of the Old Kingdom. Continue your journey with a visit to the Papyrus Institute, a perfume factory, and a cotton shop to experience Egypt’s traditional crafts. Next, visit the Egyptian Museum, which houses an extensive collection spanning from the prehistoric era to the Greco-Roman period, with 107 halls featuring massive statues, a photography section, and a vast library. After an enriching day, you will be transferred back to your hotel for an overnight stay in Cairo.

Take a leisurely walk through the mesmerizing limestone formations, where nature has sculpted incredible shapes resembling animals such as chickens, camels, and sphinxes, as well as tents and mushrooms. Marvel at the surreal beauty of this otherworldly landscape before returning to Shahrazad Camp to unwind and indulge in its luxurious comforts. Relax under the starry desert sky and enjoy a peaceful overnight stay. Representative of Travelxploria will ensure a seamless and memorable experience. Meals: Breakfast, Dinner.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Dakhla Oasis","country":"Egypt","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Farafra Oasis - Dakhla Oasis","day_summary":"

Dakhla Oasis is one of Egypt’s most remote and captivating desert treasures, nestled deep in the Western Desert. Surrounded by golden sand dunes and dramatic rock formations, the oasis is a serene blend of natural beauty and ancient history. Dotted with palm groves, hot springs, and mud-brick villages, Dakhla offers a unique glimpse into traditional desert life. Explore the ruins of Al-Qasr, a medieval Islamic town with narrow alleys and centuries-old architecture, and relax in the thermal waters of Bir Gebel or Bir Tarfawi. With its peaceful atmosphere and untouched charm, Dakhla is perfect for travelers seeking solitude, culture, and raw desert beauty.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Nile Cruise","country":"Egypt","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":" Kharga - Luxor - Karnak Temple - Luxor temple","day_summary":"

After breakfast, you will be driven to your hotel in Luxor, where you will begin your exploration with a visit to the magnificent Karnak Temple complex, the second-largest ancient religious site in the world after Angkor Wat. Karnak was the most significant religious complex in Ancient Egypt, featuring grand pillars, towering obelisks, statues, and kiosks, a testament to nearly 2,000 years of construction. Next, visit the Luxor Temple, dedicated to the worship of the Almighty God of the New Empire, Amun. This temple played a crucial role in the rejuvenation of kingship and is believed to have been the coronation site of several pharaohs, including Alexander the Great. After the tour, you will be transferred to your Nile cruise, where you will check in and enjoy a relaxing evening onboard. Representative of Travelxploria will be there to assist you throughout the journey. Meals: Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner.

After breakfast, meet your guide for an unforgettable visit to the West Bank of Luxor, starting with the legendary Valley of the Kings. While the visit to Tutankhamun’s tomb is not included, your guide will provide insightful explanations about the fascinating tombs in the area. Continue to the stunning Temple of Deir el-Bahari, dedicated to the funerary cult of Queen Hatshepsut, followed by a visit to the majestic Colossi of Memnon. After the tour, return to your Nile cruise, where you will enjoy lunch while sailing toward Esna. Relax onboard as you take in the scenic views of the Nile, followed by dinner and an overnight stay. Representative of Travelxploria will ensure a seamless experience throughout the journey. Meals: Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":" Edfu temple - Komombo temple","day_summary":"

Enjoy breakfast on board the cruise before setting off to explore the magnificent Temple of Edfu, one of the best-preserved temples in Egypt, dedicated to the Hawk-God Horus. This grand Ptolemaic temple, built between the reigns of Ptolemy III and later rulers, features remarkable inscriptions, including the myth of the battle between Horus and Seth, believed to have been reenacted annually as a religious drama. After the visit, sail toward Kom Ombo, where you will have lunch onboard while admiring the Nile’s beauty. Upon arrival, visit the unique Kom Ombo Temple, dedicated to both the falcon-headed god Horus and the crocodile god Sobek. Later, return to the cruise and continue sailing to Aswan. In the evening, enjoy dinner, attend an onboard party, and stay overnight on the cruise. Representative of Travelxploria will ensure a seamless and enriching experience throughout your journey. Meals: Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":" Aswan (Nile cruise)","day_summary":"

After enjoying breakfast on your cruise, embark on a fascinating tour of Aswan, beginning with a visit to the impressive High Dam, an engineering marvel built in 1960 to protect Egypt from the Nile’s annual floods. This colossal structure, containing 18 times the material used in the Great Pyramid of Cheops, spans 11,811 feet in length, 3,215 feet in thickness at the base, and rises to a height of 364 feet, providing essential irrigation and electricity for the entire country. Next, visit the Unfinished Obelisk, the largest known ancient obelisk, located in the northern region of Aswan’s stone quarries. Commissioned by Queen Hatshepsut (1508–1458 BC), it was intended to complement what would later be known as the Lateran Obelisk. However, due to cracks in the granite, the project was abandoned, leaving the obelisk still partially attached to the bedrock. After the excursion, return to your Nile cruise for an overnight stay onboard. Representative of Travelxploria will ensure a smooth and enriching experience throughout your journey. Meals: Breakfast, Lunch, Dinner.

Upon arrival, visit the magnificent Abu Simbel Temples, built by King Ramses II. The larger temple is dedicated to the powerful sun god Ra-Horakhty, while the smaller temple honors Ramses II himself and his beloved wife, Queen Nefertari. After exploring these remarkable structures, drive back to Aswan (approximately a three-hour journey) and transfer to Aswan Airport for your flight to Cairo. Upon arrival in Cairo, our Representative of Travelxploria will meet and assist you at the airport before transferring you to your hotel for check-in and an overnight stay. Meals: Breakfast.

After enjoying breakfast at your hotel, embark on a tour of Old and Coptic Cairo, where you will explore the oldest areas of the city and visit its historic churches. Continue your journey to Islamic Cairo to visit the Citadel, a magnificent medieval fortress dating back to the 12th century, perched on a hill overlooking the city. Within the Citadel, discover the Mosque and Tomb of the great Ottoman ruler Mohamed Ali. Proceed to the Mosque of Sultan Hassan, an architectural masterpiece that uniquely houses religious schools for each of the four main Sunni Muslim sects. After an enriching day, return to your hotel for an overnight stay in Cairo. Meals: Breakfast.Representative of Travelxploria will accompany you throughout the tour.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":" Alexandria Overday","day_summary":"

After breakfast at the hotel, Representative of Travelxploria will transfer you from your Cairo hotel for a scenic 2.5-hour drive to Alexandria. Begin your exploration with a visit to the Catacombs of Kom el Shouqafa, an underground necropolis dating back to the 1st and 2nd centuries. Continue to Pompey’s Pillar, a 25-meter-tall red Aswan granite column built in honor of Emperor Diocletian. Enjoy a photo stop outside the historic Qaitbay Fort, a 15th-century fortress built to defend Alexandria on the very site of the ancient Lighthouse of Alexandria. Conclude your Alexandria tour with a panoramic visit from the outside to the Bibliotheca Alexandrina, a modern tribute to the original great library of Alexandria. After an enriching day, transfer back to Cairo for an overnight stay at your hotel. Meals: Breakfast.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":" Farewell - Cairo International Airport ","day_summary":"

After breakfast, Representative of Travelxploria will assist you with check-out and provide a comfortable transfer to Cairo International Airport for your final departure, ensuring a smooth and hassle-free end to your journey.

packages.package_name: Safari Splendor: Aberdares, Naivasha & Masai Mara
packages.overview: Discover Kenya’s wild heart with Travelxploria’s expertly curated safari escape. Begin amid the mist-shrouded forests of Aberdare National Park, where your cozy tree-lodge perches above an illuminated salt-lick, granting unforgettable nighttime views of elephants, buffalo, and antelope gathering below. Next, unwind on the shores of Lake Naivasha and Elementaita—lime-green waters framed by acacia and flamingo-dotted flats offer the perfect setting for birdwatching and lakeside picnics. Then, brace yourself for the crown jewel of African safaris in the Masai Mara Game Reserve: dawn-to-dusk game drives reveal lions lounging in long grass, cheetahs sprinting across golden plains, and the Big Five in all their majesty. Before you depart, pause at the Rift Valley Viewpoint to drink in sweeping panoramas of geological wonder—an ideal finale to your wild journey. With every lodge stay, transfer, and expert guide seamlessly arranged by Travelxploria, you’re free to lose yourself in Kenya’s dramatic landscapes and unforgettable wildlife moments.

packages.package_name: Into the Africa Tour
packages.overview:
• Amboseli National Park – Witness majestic elephants roaming freely beneath the breathtaking backdrop of snow-capped Mount Kilimanjaro.
  • Lake Naivasha – Relax by the serene waters, surrounded by picturesque landscapes and an abundance of birdlife.
  • Masai Mara Game Reserve – Experience thrilling safari drives, spotting stealthy predators and the iconic Big Five in their untamed habitat.
  • Scenic Rift Valley – Marvel at dramatic escarpments and rolling savannahs on your journey through Kenya’s diverse terrain.
  • Unforgettable Wildlife Moments – Capture awe-inspiring encounters, from graceful gazelles to powerful lions in action.

packages.package_name: Splendors of Kazakhstan
packages.overview:
• Almaty City Tour – Explore Almaty's charming old center, vibrant Green Bazaar, historic Panfilov Park, and the stunning Ascension Cathedral.

  • Ili Alatau & Shymbulak – Experience breathtaking mountain views, the world’s highest Medeo skating rink, and Kazakhstan’s best ski resort, Shymbulak.

  • Charyn Canyon Adventure – Marvel at Kazakhstan’s spectacular Grand Canyon-like landscapes, unique rock formations, and thrilling trekking experiences.

  • Kazakh Ethno Village – Immerse in authentic Kazakh culture, exhilarating horse games, vibrant music, and delicious traditional cuisine.

  • Turkestan & Mausoleum Visit – Discover the majestic UNESCO-listed Khodja Ahmet Yassawi Mausoleum and the enchanting Karavansaray complex.

  • Otrar & Arystan-Bab – Walk through the ruins of the ancient Silk Road city and visit the sacred Arystan-Bab Mausoleum.

  • Astana Sightseeing – Admire futuristic architecture, including Baiterek Tower, Nur Alem Museum, and the magnificent Astana Grand Mosque.

  • Palace of Peace & National Museum – Explore Astana’s iconic pyramid and Kazakhstan’s largest museum, showcasing ancient artifacts and national heritage.

Visit Park of 28 Panfilov Soldiers, home to heroic memorials, the Ascension Cathedral, and the Museum of Musical Instruments. Experience the lively Green Bazaar, where you can sample local delicacies and bargain for souvenirs. After lunch, immerse in nature at Ili Alatau National Park, visit the Medeo Skating Rink and Shymbulak Mountain Resort. End the day with a breathtaking panoramic view from Kok Tobe Park, before returning to the hotel.

Canyon","day_summary":"

Start your day with an early breakfast before embarking on a scenic bus tour (08:00 – 20:00) to Charyn Canyon, one of Kazakhstan’s most breathtaking natural wonders. Located 220 km from Almaty, this spectacular canyon, often called the \"little brother\" of the Grand Canyon, stretches 154 km and is steeped in legends of \"witches,\" \"red wolves,\" and the \"road to hell.\" Enjoy a leisurely trek through the famous \"Valley of Castles\", where towering rock formations create a mesmerizing landscape. After admiring the breathtaking panoramic views and having lunch by the Charyn River, return to Almaty for an overnight stay.

","day_element":[]},{"day_title":"Immersing in Kazakh Nomadic Traditions & Journey to Shymkent","day_summary":"


After breakfast and check-out, set off for the Kazakh Ethno Village \"Huns\", a cultural escape 35 km from Almaty in the scenic Talgar district. Experience the nomadic lifestyle with a warm \"shashu\" welcome, explore traditional yurts, witness ancient Kazakh rituals like \"Besikke salu\" and \"Tusau kesu,\" and enjoy thrilling horse games such as \"Kyz Kuu\" and \"Atpen Audaryspak.\" Participate in folk dances, live music, and a hands-on \"baursak\" cooking masterclass.

After a traditional Kazakh lunch, return to Almaty for free time. Later, transfer to the railway station (21:00) for an overnight train journey (22:00) to Turkestan.

","day_element":[]}]},{"city":"Turkestan","country":"Kazakhstan","banner_image":null,"day_details":[{"day_title":"Exploring Turkestan","day_summary":"

Upon arrival in Shymkent, enjoy a hearty breakfast before embarking on a journey to Turkestan, home to some of Kazakhstan’s most revered historical landmarks.Your sightseeing tour begins at the UNESCO-listed Mausoleum of Khodja Ahmed Yassawi, a 14th-century architectural masterpiece built by Amir Timur in honor of the great philosopher. This sacred site is one of Central Asia’s most significant Islamic pilgrimage destinations, filled with mystical stories and legends.After check-in, explore the Karavansaray complex, a vibrant cultural hub offering a blend of immersive shows, traditional activities, and modern entertainment that showcase Kazakhstan’s rich heritage.Overnight stay at a hotel in Turkestan.

After breakfast at the hotel, check out and embark on a journey to Otrar, an ancient city that was once a vital hub on the Great Silk Road. Known as Farab, this historic site played a crucial role in Central Asia’s trade and cultural exchanges.En route to Shymkent, stop at the Arystan-Bab Mausoleum, a revered pilgrimage site dedicated to the spiritual mentor of Khodja Akhmet Yassawi. Arystan-Bab was a prominent Sufi teacher, and his tomb remains a sacred place for worship.

Upon arrival in Shymkent, enjoy a delightful local lunch, followed by a short city tour, exploring its vibrant streets and cultural highlights.Head back to your hotel and enjoy free time to relax. Overnight stay in Turkestan.

Upon arrival at 12:45, you will be transferred to a local restaurant for a delightful lunch before embarking on a fascinating city tour. The tour begins with a visit to the iconic Baiterek Monument, a towering 97-meter-high structure offering breathtaking panoramic views of the city. Next, explore Khan Shatyr, the world’s largest tent-shaped architectural marvel, combining shopping, entertainment, and leisure. Conclude the day with a scenic walk along the Ishim River, soaking in Astana’s stunning skyline before transferring to the hotel for an overnight stay.

{"title":"Bhaskar Chakraborty","rating":"5","publishDate":"2025-02-05","publishBy":"","subItems":[{"type":"text","content":"

10th October 2024 we went on a trip to Meghalaya and Shillong which was arranged by Travel Exploria . All the beautiful places on our itinerary were well covered and time coordination was perfect .We were able to have a relaxing family trip and visit various tourist spots and get a taste of local cuisine and rich culture .The falls of Shillong ,lush green Meghalaya captivated us with its ethereal beauty . overview:
Unlock the World – Under 1,50,000 with Travelxploria
Luxury, Culture, and Timeless Escapes – All Within Reach

The dream of exploring the world doesn't belong to the wealthy alone—it belongs to the dreamers, the explorers, the lovers of sunsets in strange cities, of breakfast on the beach, of quiet mountain paths and music-filled squares. And now, with Travelxploria’s premium collection of journeys under 1,50,000, the world isn’t just within reach—it’s ready to embrace you.

Imagine drifting in a pool that melts into the Indian Ocean, as soft breezes carry the scent of salt and sun-kissed flowers. Picture yourself wandering through narrow cobbled streets where centuries echo in every footstep, or floating past misty Alpine peaks with nothing but silence and sky. Whether it’s a candlelit dinner on a tropical island, a gondola ride beneath starlit bridges, or watching the pyramids glow at dusk—you don’t have to imagine it anymore. You just have to pack.

With Travelxploria, your Best Travel Agency and award-winning Best International Tour Operator, every journey is an artfully curated symphony of comfort, wonder, and unforgettable memories. Our Best Tour Operator services ensure that even the grandest destinations are accessible—with no compromise on experience. This is travel that doesn’t cut corners—it opens doors.

Our under 1,50,000 experiences are crafted for the curious heart and the discerning traveler. Sail through Europe’s timeless rivers, where fairy-tale towns and grand capitals greet you in a single voyage. Lose yourself in the serene opulence of overwater villas in the Maldives or the postcard-perfect charm of Mauritius’s turquoise lagoons and volcanic landscapes. Let the ancient mysteries of Egypt and Jordan unfold before your eyes—from mighty pyramids to rose-red cities carved into cliffs—each moment steeped in story.

And then, there are the unexpected joys: lantern festivals in Southeast Asia that light up your soul, desert safaris across golden dunes where silence tells its own tale, or mountaintop cable rides offering views you’ll remember long after the pictures fade. Every destination you’ve longed for, every emotion you hoped to feel—now lies within a smart, thoughtfully budgeted experience.

For honeymooners, Travelxploria—your Best Honeymoon Planner—creates dreamy escapes that blend privacy, romance, and soul-stirring landscapes. Toast to new beginnings by the beach, beneath the stars, or within a heritage city lit with evening charm. And for families, our handpicked Best Family Package options bring together child-friendly fun and grown-up indulgence—cultural walks, guided excursions, relaxing resorts, and lots of moments that become cherished memories.

What makes our under 1,50,000 journeys truly special is how much they include. From carefully selected accommodations and curated local experiences to seamless airport transfers and professional guides, we take care of every detail, so you only focus on being present. Whether you’re a first-time traveler or a seasoned globe-trotter, we tailor your trip with precision, passion, and personality.

Our travelers don't just collect passport stamps—they collect stories. A smile shared with a shopkeeper in a hidden village. A photograph taken at the edge of the world. A local dish that surprises you with its warmth. These are the things you remember—not how much you paid, but how deeply you felt.

At Travelxploria, we believe value doesn’t mean compromise—it means confidence. Confidence that your journey is worth every rupee. Confidence that you’re travelling with the Best Travel Agency, backed by the expertise of the Best Tour Operator and the insight of a true Best International Tour Operator.

So go ahead. Let your heart choose the destination—be it island, city, mountain, or desert. We’ll make sure it fits not just your bucket list, but your budget too.

Uncover the extraordinary. Live the luxury. Travel the world—under 1,50,000—with Travelxploria.
